name: mfe-storefront
description: Micro-Frontend Storefront — Webpack 5 Module Federation (Vue 3 + React 18)

scripts.start: concurrently "npm run start:product" "npm run start:profile" "npm run start:shell"
scripts.build: npm run build:product && npm run build:profile && npm run build:shell
scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix shell-host && npm install --prefix product-remote && npm install --prefix profile-remote
